name: anytone-v2
description: AnyTone D578 controller — v2 (redesign). Layered, capture-verified rebuild of the PoC in ../app. See redesign/*.md for the contract.
comment:overrides: xml2js: dbus-next's runtime XML parser (prototype-pollution fix). node-gyp/tar/glob: modernize the build toolchain that dbus-next's OPTIONAL usocket drags in — node-gyp@11 drops the deprecated `request` and its critical form-data/tough-cookie/uuid/qs chain (audit 11→0), and glob@13 (the current, non-deprecated line — also what @fastify/static@10 uses) silences the isaacs deprecation warning. usocket itself is unused: BlueZ's system bus is a filesystem socket plain net handles.
